Referral Email Promotion (Retail)                                                        Copyright Free Template



SUBJECT:  Get [insert referral bonus] today…



Hi (customer name), 



Thanks for shopping with [insert store].  



We’d love for you to introduce your friends to

[store name], So here’s a discount coupon for 

you to use. 



Simply forward this email or share the link 

below on your favorite forum, blog, or social media 

site to give your friends [insert bonus]. 



In appreciation, you’ll also get [insert referral bonus] 

when they make a purchase. 



To activate this coupon, ask your friends to start 

shopping using the link [insert link] and to use 

the discount code that’s displayed when they 

make their purchases. 



Remember, this discount expired on [insert date] 

so take action today! 



Sincerely, 



[Your Name]
